round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent provided no output in either round, which is appropriate given the lack of visible text in the image.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent synthesized cross-agent evidence (Botanics, Meta) to refine its confidence from medium to high, correctly narrowing the geographic scope.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent effectively used cross-domain evidence (Landscape, Meta) to rule out tropical regions and confirm the Mediterranean/temperate profile of Chile.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent integrated infrastructure observations from the Meta agent to strengthen the case for Chile over other Southern Cone countries.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent successfully synthesized botanical and landscape cues to reinforce its initial high-confidence assessment of Chilean residential architecture.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge provided a clear, evidence-based synthesis. It correctly identified the lack of linguistic evidence, validated the visual consistency of the other agents' claims (driving side, infrastructure, vegetation), and logically eliminated incorrect candidates (Peru, Argentina) based on the specific combination of architectural and botanical markers.
